title: Capstone Project
scope: Every student builds and ships their own working, tested, documented tool. All work is individual.

assessments.title: Capstone Project and Portfolio
assessments.requirement: Individual 10-minute live demo to faculty panel: Problem → Spec → Live Demo → Eval Results → Judgment Framework applied → Cost and latency note → 3 Learnings; 5 min Q&A. Panel probes: model selection, prompt design, output validation logic, failure handling, API cost estimation. Portfolio via GitHub: all lab notebooks, specs, eval harness, red-team results, AI Decision Journal, 400-word technical reflection.
